generated_oml:
instance AECOBuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure system comprising BCS components and BIM integration"
    base:contains LightingActuator, HVACActuator, DittoDevice, DittoConnection
]

instance LightingStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring lighting system status (on/off, brightness, color temperature)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingStatusSensor
]

instance LightingStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Lighting system status data (on/off, brightness, color temperature)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device metadata (e.g., Revit-specific photometric values) as geometric foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance LightTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computational model for UE5 light rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance LightFeatureParser : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computational model for handling on, brightness, and color temperature commands"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for message delivery"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for policy-based validation and persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MDEFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for automatically generating DT artifacts from enriched BIM models with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelGenerationService
]

instance ModularExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for custom service integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and control of building operations via interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight, ControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for scenario testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationInsight
]

instance ModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for automatically generating DT artifacts from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelGenerationInsight
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for control operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance insights"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational optimization insights"
]

instance ScenarioSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Scenario testing simulation results"
]

instance ModelGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated DT artifact generation from BIM models"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator controlled via on/off, brightness, and color temperature commands"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator for temperature and airflow control"
]

instance DittoDevice : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages device addressing for physical actuators"
]

instance DittoConnection : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages connections for device communication"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT system employs a modular architecture with a central hub framework coordinating roles including Building Control Engineers (device modeling and deployment initiation), Facility Managers (real-time monitoring and control), and DT Engineers (service integration), enabling bidirectional data exchange for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The framework supports the complete life cycle of DT deployment and operation, spanning from initial device modeling using BIM to custom service development. Key stages include modeling by Building Control Engineers, monitoring and operation by Facility Managers, and evolution via custom services by DT Engineers. Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) enables automated transformation of BIM models into deployable artifacts, while a modular architecture with standardized extension points ensures governance and evolution throughout the lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Data integrity is maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation enforcing sensor data value ranges and units, and pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is provided by Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, ensuring resilience against network failures and maintaining synchronization between physical assets and digital twins."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is addressed via non-functional requirements, utilizing enriched BIM models and standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework addresses standardization through standardized data schemas, BIM integration for modeling, and modular architecture with standardized extension points for interoperability. However, specific industry standards (e.g., ISO, IEC), certification requirements, or detailed compliance frameworks are not mentioned in the documents."
]
